message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Initialization

participant "service process" as SP {
    participant "ConcreteImpl" as CI
    participant "DBusAdapter" as DBA
}

participant "DBus" as DBus

participant "client process" as CP {
    participant "DBusProxy" as DProxy
}

DBA -> DBA: Init(ConcreteImpl)
DBA -> DBus: Export
DProxy -> DProxy: Init
DProxy -> DBus: ConnectToRemoteObject
note right of DProxy: Tries to fetch all properties\nincluding "ready" property
DBus -> DBA: GetAllProperties
DBA --> DBus: return properties
DBus --> DProxy: return properties

@enduml
```
